Commanding Officer, Example Receiving Activity Bravo

subj: C8 WARNING TO-LINE-ONLY WITH MORE THAN FOUR ADDRESSEES FIXTURE
body: 1. This fixture intentionally lists more than four To addressees without distribution_mode, which should trigger a C8-002 warning but still PASS.
2. C8-002 says four or fewer action addressees are placed on the To line; more than four should use a Distribution line instead.
